title: lindsaea javanensis
intro: Lindsaea javanensis, also known as the Java Lindsaea, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. This plant is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, characterized by its long, slender fronds. Lindsaea javanensis has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is also used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its health benefits.
